text: distributed systems handle large scale data processing
machine learning models require feature engineering pipelines
spark shuffle operations move data across cluster nodes
data warehouses store historical analytical information
clustering algorithms group similar data points together

business intelligence dashboards visualize key metrics
graph algorithms traverse connected node relationships

locality sensitive hashing finds approximate nearest neighbors
columnar storage formats reduce analytical query costs
pagerank computes importance scores for graph vertices
